name: Lavanga (Clove)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Kapha and Pitta.
Virya: Sheeta (Cooling) - Note: Cloves are uniquely cooling despite being pungent.
plantProfile: Dried flower buds of an aromatic tree.
preparationMethods: Clove tea or direct application of oil to gums.
safetyProfile: Clove oil is very strong; dilute before skin contact.
